outFile.description: Output file path. If not specified, derived from service name

assets.description: Assets to copy to dist folder

include.description: Glob pattern for files to include (e.g., src/**/*.graphql)

exclude.description: Glob pattern for files to exclude

outDir.description: Output directory relative to service root (e.g., dist/schema)

flatten.description: Flatten directory structure (copy all files to outDir root)
